prompt: Create an HTML slide presentation for a SaaS startup pitch deck. Include these slides: Cover with company name 'CloudSync', Problem (data silos in enterprises), Solution (unified data platform), Market Size (TAM/SAM/SOM with numbers), Business Model (subscription tiers), Traction (growth metrics with charts), Team (3 co-founders), and Thank You. Use English only, professional blue color theme.
assertions: All text content is in English
Contains data visualization for market size or traction
Has fragment elements for progressive reveal
Font stack does not require Noto Sans KR (English only)
